creator: maxim@macomnet.ru
text:
Hello,

> >How-To-Repeat:
>
> when i use unix domain socket very frequently(maybe two in a second
> ) and share one socket fd to a lot of process(send fd to another
> process),it will cause system crash and reboot with no log

Any chances you'll give us a simple test case?

-- 
Maxim Konovalov
